title: Food import costs rise after tariff announcement
snippet: Imported staples may become more expensive over the next month as suppliers reprice.
rationale: Tariff coverage on imported staples; pass-through likely within one billing cycle.

title: Appliance repair parts face new import pressure
snippet: Repair quotes may rise for mid-range appliances and replacement parts.
rationale: Cross-border parts coverage in tariff list; one-time costs flagged.

title: Logistics employers slow hiring in Ontario corridor
snippet: The household work profile overlaps with the reported sector softness.
rationale: Sector-specific hiring slowdown matches household primary sector.

title: WTI crude jumps after supply disruption
snippet: Commute-heavy households face a higher pump-price exposure window.
rationale: Crude move tends to translate to retail fuel within 5-10 days.

title: Wheat and dairy futures climb on logistics constraints
snippet: Staple baskets can move faster than headline CPI when transport stress persists.
rationale: Futures up on staples used in household basket model.

title: Natural gas volatility lifts utility watch index
snippet: Utility-sensitive households should watch the next billing cycle.
rationale: Spot natural gas drives utility bill exposure for renters with included heating.
